The '''Alderaan Museum of Fine Arts''' was a [[Museum/Legends|museum]] located within the [[Core District/Legends|Core District]] of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Cinnagar/Legends|Cinnagar]]. Like many of the attractions within the Core District, the museum's architecture represented a specific [[Planet/Legends|planet]] within the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]; specifically [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. The fine arts presented in the museum were a collection of works from the galactic core.
